mapper.sql: id, inventory_type, material_cd, material_nm, width_mm, height_mm, current_qty, available_qty, reserved_qty, unit, area_pyeong, min_qty, max_qty, supplier_cd, supplier_nm, warehouse_cd, location, TO_CHAR(snapshot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS snapshot_date
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hkgn.inventory ORDER BY inventory_type, material_cd, width_mm, height_mm

SELECT FROM hkgn.inventory WHERE 1=1
AND inventory_type = #{inventoryType}
AND ( material_cd ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR material_nm ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR supplier_nm ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR location ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY inventory_type, material_cd, width_mm, height_mm

SELECT id, transaction_no, TO_CHAR(transaction_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS transaction_date, transaction_type, material_cd, material_nm, width_mm, height_mm, quantity, unit, area_pyeong, before_qty, after_qty, from_location, to_location, site_cd, site_nm, vehicle_no, ref_doc_type, ref_doc_no, remarks FROM hkgn.inventory_transaction ORDER BY transaction_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, transaction_no, TO_CHAR(transaction_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS transaction_date, transaction_type, material_cd, material_nm, width_mm, height_mm, quantity, unit, area_pyeong, before_qty, after_qty, from_location, to_location, site_cd, site_nm, vehicle_no, ref_doc_type, ref_doc_no, remarks FROM hkgn.inventory_transaction WHERE material_cd = #{materialCd} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC, id DESC
